title: Invalid form posts can return no response
reasoning: These POST handlers return a redirect only when form.is_valid() is true. If validation fails, the method falls off the end and returns None, which Django treats as an invalid view response and raises an error instead of re-rendering the form with validation messages. Users can trigger this with malformed or incomplete edit submissions.
recommendation: For each edit POST handler, re-render the corresponding edit template with the bound invalid form and object context when form.is_valid() is false.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: Finances/tests.py has no tests for invalid form submissions to edit endpoints.
suggestedRegressionTest: Post invalid payloads to each edit URL as an authenticated user and assert a 200 response containing the bound form errors instead of an exception.
minimumFixScope: Invalid-form branches in CategoryEditView.post, WalletEditView.post, TransactionEditView.post, and BudgetEditView.post.
